rationale: Acting on Review 1 yields the better PR: its first finding correctly identifies the four general lemmas (BialgHom.{map_antipode,antipode_comp}, Bialgebra.TensorProduct.{map_id,map_comp}) that are marked private in the diff yet are broadly reusable helpers for any TauCeti file dealing with bialgebra maps or tensor products; exposing them (and dropping the four duplicate no-op specializations of Mathlib's TensorProduct/Bialgebra.TensorProduct lemmas) directly improves reuse. Review 2's approval leaves those issues untouched and therefore produces an inferior result on the reuse axis.
